mission.title: meshery: [Server] Race condition in K8s component registration
mission.description: [Server] Race condition in K8s component registration. Requested by 2+ users.

steps.title: Check current meshery deployment
steps.description:
Verify your meshery version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n meshery -l app.kubernetes.io/name=meshery
helm list -n meshery 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working meshery installation.

steps.title: Review meshery configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant meshery configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n meshery -l app.kubernetes.io/name=meshery
kubectl get configmap -n meshery -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=meshery
```
In the following code, the reference to range value `ctx` at line 86 generates a race condition because it is a reference in the body of a gorutine.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [Server] Race condition in K8s component registration
steps.description:
This PR fixes #6357

This PR fix the race condition by passing the range value as argument of the concurrent function.
The PR also includes some code reorganization to make it more GO idiomatic.
```yaml
Iteration at context-1
Iteration at context-2
Iteration at context-3
Iteration at context-4
Iteration at context-5
Concurrently using context-5
Concurrently using context-5
Concurrently using context-5
Concurrently using context-5
Concurrently using context-5

Program exited.
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n meshery -l app.kubernetes.io/name=meshery
kubectl get events -n meshery --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[Server] Race condition in K8s component registration" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
This PR fixes #6357

This PR fix the race condition by passing the range value as argument of the concurrent function.
The PR also includes some code reorganization to make it more GO idiomatic.
codeSnippets:
Iteration at context-1
Iteration at context-2
Iteration at context-3
Iteration at context-4
Iteration at context-5
Concurrently using context-5
Concurrently using context-5
Concurrently using context-5
Concurrently using context-5
Concurrently using context-5

Program exited.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with meshery installed or the issue environment reproducible.
